blocks.text: Match preview: India Women face Bangladesh Women in 23rd Match, Group A (T20) on Thu, 25 Jun, 2026, 7:00 pm at Emirates Old Trafford Manchester. Full pitch report, weather forecast, and squad details below.
Classic English seaming conditions when clouds cover; batting paradise in sunshine.
Overcast · High 32°C / Low 22°C · Rain: 0 mm · Wind: up to 19 km/h. Cloud cover expected — seamers may get movement with the new ball.
International playing XI is announced at the toss. Check back on match day for confirmed line-ups.
